The Aster cerberoanus is further classified into the tribe Astereae and the subtribe Astranthinae within the Asteraceae family. Some Aster species have been reported to have health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
